Filters and sharing
About this data

This map shows Australian residential aged care homes from the official GEN Aged Care Data service list, published by the Department of Health, Disability and Ageing.

Source: Aged care service list: 30 June 2025. The source page says the files are current as at 30 June 2025 and updated annually.

Included rows have Care Type equal to Residential, residential places above zero, and valid latitude/longitude. This version maps 2590 homes across 709 providers.

Cross-check: February 2026 Star Ratings service-level extract. 2386 homes matched exactly; 145 matched by service/suburb/state with provider-name differences; 59 were not matched and should be manually reviewed.

Absence from the Star Ratings extract is not treated as proof that a home has closed.
